entries.title: Iran threatens to block more trade routes as US launches fresh strikes
entries.summary: US President Donald Trump vowed to strike Iran's bridges and power plants next week if the country does not return to talks.

entries.title: I still feel pain of '98 but this can be different for England, says Shearer
entries.summary: England's defeat by Argentina at the 1998 World Cup still burns deep for Alan Shearer, but he explains why this team can take their chance to change their lives forever.

entries.title: Midnight social media curfew proposed for UK teens aged 16 and 17 - but they can opt out
entries.summary: The government also wants 'addictive' app features such as auto-play and infinite scroll to be set to be disabled.

entries.title: Travellers warned of methanol poisoning risks in new campaign
entries.summary: Holidaymakers are urged to understand the dangers and symptoms of methanol poisoning.

entries.title: UK's extreme weather is the new normal, Met Office says
entries.summary: The latest report on the UK's climate warns cold mountainous areas are also being lost.

entries.title: After record heat, could the Atlantic make Britain's weather even more extreme?
entries.summary: As temperatures rise, scientists are investigating whether a changing Atlantic could bring more volatile weather to the UK

entries.title: How will Buy Now Pay Later changes affect you?
entries.summary: Consumers should be better protected as Buy Now Pay Later lenders now require authorisation to operate.

entries.title: Briton's Iran jail sentence extended by two years, family says
entries.summary: Relatives of Craig Foreman say his punishment is being extended for talking to the media from jail.

entries.title: Three killed as Russian bombing of Odesa continues
entries.summary: In recent days, Russia and Ukraine have launched attacks on each others' infrastructure for shipping goods.

entries.title: Police say Ann Widdecombe killed in 'targeted attack' as motive investigated
entries.summary: Counter terror police say they have obtained a warrant to hold a 28-year-old suspect for up to seven days.
